title: Background card fetch on post creation
description: When a new post is created (via CLI, webhook, or feed), extract the first https URL from content. Spawn a tokio task to fetch the URL (SSRF-guarded, size-limited to 1MB, 10s timeout), parse OG metadata, and INSERT into cards table. If image_url is present, download and cache it (separate task).
close_reason: Done: spawn_fetch() called from webhook.rs and feed.rs. CLI does synchronous fetch. SSRF-guarded, size-limited.
